## Scraper-specific checklist (required for scraper changes)
- [ ] Source(s) affected listed
- [ ] Sample raw payload/HTML fixture included or linked
- [ ] Parser/normalization test added or updated
- [ ] Expected listing-volume impact documented
- [ ] Rollback plan included for production schedule changes
